product.title: The Green Pet Shop Cool Pet Pad - Large, Blue - Self-Cooling, Pressure Activated Mat for Dogs & Cats from 46-80 lbs - Non-Toxic Gel, No Water Needed

brand_store.text: Visit the The Green Pet Shop Store

product.description: You have probably noticed that your dog struggles to stay cool in the balmy, summer heat. We have the solution for your beloved pet. Proudly presenting the Cooling Pet Pad from the Green Pet Shop, the original cooling pad for dogs. Designed with your pet in mind, our patented technology works without refrigeration, water, or electricity. The pressure, weight and motion activated gel absorbs heat from your pet and reduces their body temperature to cool your dog on contact. And there is more. This cooling effect lasts for up to 4 hours of constant use. The pad helpfully recharges itself automatically after a brief period of non-use (approximately 15-20 minutes) so that your dog can enjoy the cooling sensation throughout the day, with no effort from you. Proudly featuring a specially formulated non-toxic gel, the pad is safe for pets, people and the planet. Simply place the mat on the ground, indoors or outdoors, and once your dog lies on it, watch them experience the magic. Both soothing and comforting, this perfect pet seat aids in the relief of pain, swelling, discomfort and stress, as well as the health conditions such as heat stroke, hip dysplasia, Cushing’s disease, allergies, skin conditions and post-surgery / chemotherapy. It's also ideal for older dogs when they get too hot and find it difficult to regulate their body temperature. Portable and convenient, it folds effortlessly, wipes clean with soap and water and is designed to last. Place it on the floor, on the bed, in the car, or even outside. Your pet will stay so cool; you may decide to get one for yourself. Our product and technology has sparked a host of cheap imitators. Others may try to copy us, but they are no competition. Put the Cooling Pet Pad to the test today and give your dog the perfect summer treat that they deserve. Do not leave in direct sunlight, heat or hot air as this may affect the performance of the Cool Pet Pad. This product is not meant for consumption and while the gel is non-toxic, we always recommend taking your pet to the veterinarian if they ingest any part of the Cool Pet Pad. If your pet is prone to chewing, do not leave it unattended with the Cool Pet Pad.
feature_bullets: THE ORIGINAL SELF COOLING GEL PAD FOR DOGS – The Green Pet Shop pressure-activated cooling pet mat provides chilled relief for your dogs and cats. It's the perfect solution if your pet struggles to stay cool and comfortable in the summer heat

IT'S AUTOMATIC – This self-cooling pad for dogs works without water, electricity or refrigeration. The patented gel formula automatically recharges after 15-20 minutes of non-use. This dog cool pad is a must-have item if your home doesn't have air conditioning

PERFECT FOR HOT SUMMER DAYS – Lay the cooling pads for pets where your furry friend likes to relax. Once they lay on the pad, it goes to work immediately. Cool to the touch, the chilled sensation offers immediate relief. It's ideal for senior animals or pets with medical conditions

MULTI-USE AND PORTABLE – Use it on the floor, sofa, or place it in your pet's crate, bed or kennel. The cooling pads are lightweight and folds effortlessly, ideal for travel. Clean with a damp cloth as needed

LARGE DOG COOLING PAD – This pet cooling gel mat measures 23.6 x 35 inches, for large dogs weighing between 45 - 80 lbs. Other sizes are available. Do not leave in direct sunlight as this will affect the performance of the cool pad

fastest_delivery.text: Or Prime members get FREE delivery Saturday, March 14. Order within 7 hrs 8 mins. Join Prime

specifications.name: Item Package Dimensions L x W x H
Directions
specifications.value: The cooling pad is weight or pressure activated. As soon as your pet lies down, the cooling effect starts and lasts for up to four hours (depending upon conditions)! The pad recharges automatically after a short period of non-use. You can supercool your pad by putting it in the refrigerator and it will last even longer. Easy to use: Place in a convenient location where your pet likes to relax. As soon as pressure is applied, the cooling effect will kick into action! (Green Tip: Try placing a treat or one of your pet’s favorite toys next to the pad to introduce them to it!) Easy to Clean: Clean by hand with a damp wash-cloth or towel. Do not machine wash.

local.title: Our "double-coat" dog has needed this for years, and now he has it!
local.text: I am naturally sceptical of advertiser & seller claims for products, but thought we'd give one of these a try for our 13-year old "Half-scale Otter Hound" mutt, who has the same double-thick, oily coat of Otter Hounds and many other water dogs. He's always panting, particularly at night, and wanting to go outside several times a night, even in deep winter cold, to cool off, which is a pain for us, as he needs help getting back up the steps and into the house, due to arthritus. Additionally, he needs a soft dog bed to rest his painful joints, but the bed makes him heat up quickly, so he's continually moving to the bed, to a cool, hard floor, struggling to get up, and panting all the time. We got this cooling mat about a month ago, and he avoided it for the first 2 days, then settled onto it sometimes, and seemed OK with it. Around the 4th day, I moved it to his dog bed, and WOW-- what a change! No panting at all, he seeks it out every time he lays down, and obviously prefers it. Even more, he sleeps so much better, so that in the mornings, despite his tired, old joints giving him a lot of pain, he even RUNS around the yard, and RUNS to meet my wife when he wants to come back in. He plays more with our other 2 smaller dogs, and overall seems a LOT more comfortable and happy. The Green Pet Cooling Mat in his dog bed is HIS Spot, now, and he's learned on his own to get off for about half an hour to let it "re-charge", and then gets back on. I just now bought a 2nd mat of the same brand-- We plan to either put it on the floor or in one of the other dogs' beds--- They used to rotate beds a few times during the night, although these days, nobody else gets "his" bed with the cooling mat. I have heard the other dogs "digging"/"scratching" the fabric the middle of their beds sometimes, just like he used to also do, and I think it's an instinctual canine reactionj to being "too hot", i.e., "digging down to cooler soil", so we'll see how this goes. If it goes well, we'll probably order a Small cooling mat for our smallest dog. The mats seem quite durable, aren't nearly as heavy as some make them out to be (my wife has severe spinal stenosis and bad arthritus, and she said to leave word in this review that she has no problem at all handling them. My only regret is that we didnt get some of these years ago. A very good product, and it seems well-made, to last a very long time! FOLLOW UP, about a week after I posted this item, above: We received the 2nd cooling mat, and right away put it in the "medium-size" dog bed, normally preferred by our 3-year old Corgie-Lab mix. She avoided it the first day, although our "big" dog that we bought the first cooling mat for, went for it right away, switching back and forth from each cooling mat-equipped bed, as needed. The 2nd night, our Corgie-Lab mix finally discovered what it was all about, and now, if not sleeping on one of our laps, prefers to sleeping on "her" mat atop "her" dog bed. So, now I have 2 dogs that love these cooling mats. Our "little" dog, a Jack Russell-Shi Tzu mix has a thin coat, and thus looses body heat easily, but I suspect as summer comes on (this is 13 May), we might buy a another mat sized for her, as well. Suffice to say that our dogs seem to really like this product, and I can heartily recommend it. P.S.: When the dogs go out to the back yard, to chase squirrels, bark at passing dogs, or do other "Dog Stuff"-- I've learned that picking up each mat and holding it up vertically so that both sides get air helps cool it off quicker, so that even if they're outside for just a few minutes, they return to a cold mat. The original mat we got for our "big" (actually only 85 lbs) dog is still large enough for him to sleep on half of it, then roll over to the "cold half" for more comfortable sleep. Although he has still panted for short periods, at night on it lately, mostly he just dozes off and snores for hours at a time-- a refreshing change from having him panting and moving around restlessly all night before we got the mats. Some reviews of Dog Cooling Mats suggest putting the mat into the refrigerator, but I think that would be far too much cooling in a short time-- these things are cold to the touch when you pick them up-- and the object is to slowly draw off the dog's body heat without over-cooling it, and they do that very well. We're quite satisfied.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on May 6, 2023

local.title: Does Exactly What It Promises – Just Supervise Chewers
local.text: The Green Pet Shop Cool Pet Pad does exactly what it says and has been a great help keeping my dog comfortable on warm days. Instant Cooling, No Power Needed:I love that this pad activates automatically with pressure—no water, freezing, or electricity required. As soon as my dog lies on it, it starts cooling and provides noticeable relief from the heat. Comfortable & Convenient:The pad is soft and flexible, making it easy to place in a crate, on the floor, or on a dog bed. It’s lightweight and easy to move around the house or take along for travel. Works Well in Warm Weather:On hot days, this has been a go-to spot for my dog. They naturally choose it when they want to cool off, which tells me it really works. Important Note for Puppies/Chewers:If you have a puppy or a dog that likes to chew, be sure to supervise. Ours tried to chew the pad and exposed some of the gel inside. This isn’t a fault of the product—it’s doing its job—but it’s not meant to be a chew toy. Overall Impression:As a cooling mat, this works exactly as advertised and is a great option for helping pets stay cool and comfortable. With a little supervision for chewers, it’s an excellent product.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on December 28, 2025

local.title: Cat Approved
local.text: I have a stray Maine Coon-mix cat that likes to spend time on occasion in my garage. Given the hot weather, I felt the Green Pet Shop Cool Bed Pad would be a good choice to keep this kitty more comfortable. I liked the idea that it required no maintenance, and it would keep the cat cool in the Summer and warm in the Winter making this a pad that could be used year-round. The cat is a male weighing around 20lbs., so the medium size was the perfect choice. It appears durable, well-made and has some cushion. It has some weight, but not unusually heavy. This seems to keep the pad in place on the ground. My little friend took to it right away and slept on it most of the day. I am happy if kitty is happy! I am pleased with my purchase and recommend this pad for a cat or small dog.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on July 3, 2025

local.title: 3rd times the charm
local.text: I initially ordered this because our summer heat comes closer to fall & my dog is not a summer girlie. There was no medium or the color Sage at the time, so i opted for a blue large since she likes to lay spread out anyway. I had to order this 3 times because the first 2 were defective. - One was leaking, the other had mold - even though the boxes were brand new. The 3rd one came with no defect, which was nice. Its about an inch thick with a durable plastic that is lined and sewn around the edges. Because it came folded in the box, it's not truly smooth and has the creases. It does get cold, but not as cold as I would've liked it to be (i used my bare foot). I've only tested it today, but she's actually laying on it with the help of her cooling blanket. Although we had the inconvenience of having to order 3x and return this twice, the easy return and the quick shipping did sort of make up for it. We are planning on a road trip soon, so i will update this after to see if it has help & ill adjuat my stars accordingly. Edit:We had our road trip and we had this in the back seat with her. My dog would only lay on it if it had her cooling blanket there. She didnt care for it much, but shes also a particular dog. I'm still keeping this as it is still useful to have.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on August 23, 2025

global.title: Cool for about 2min
global.text: Im in Sydney, Australia and bought a medium to put on the bed or couch for my Maltese to lie on. The size is portable, she can lie most of her body on it but I wouldn’t have gone any smaller. It looks just like the pictures and arrived on time. It’s cool to the touch but warms up very quickly (maybe after less than 2min?) I don’t think there’s much difference between how quickly this mat or any other surface would warm up. On very hot days the mat is hot when indoors (same temp as the air). Lying directly on the floorboards is much cooler than this mat. Unfortunately it doesn’t perform anywhere near as well as it claims to. I was tricked by the positive reviews.
